security_switch: 996 - Financial Management > Accounts Receivable > Customer Profile
menu_paths: Financial Management > Accounts Receivable > Customer Profile
IntelliDealer Menus > Financial Management > Accounts Receivable > Customer Profile: Listing
purpose: search for a customer profile and open it for edit. See Searching for Customer Profiles
or add a new Customer Profile
1. Enter your search criteria in the appropriate fields. See Screen Description
The Customer Profiles that meet the search criteria are shown. If only one profile entry is found, the
system automatically opens the screen displaying the corresponding profile
3. Locate the desired customer from the results and click on it to open the Customer Profile
If Search Extended Fields is selected and you enter a Customer Name then executing a search also scans:
the Customer Profile: Contacts tab for a matching firstName or lastName
the Customer Profile: Ship To tab for a matching name

fields.name: Search 1 or 2
fields.description: Search for a customer by entering either search word 1 or 2.

fields.name: Phone Number
fields.description: Search for a customer by entering a phone number.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Search for a customer by selecting a specific customer status from the drop down list. For example: All, Active, Deleted or prospect customer status.

fields.name: Customer Number
fields.description: Search for a customer by entering a customer number.

fields.name: City
fields.description: Search for a customer by entering a city location.

fields.name: Territory
fields.description: Search within a specific territory

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Search for a customer by entering a customer name.

fields.name: Location
fields.description: Search for a customer by entering a location.

fields.name: Salesperson
fields.description: Search for a customer by entering a salesperson.

fields.name: Search Extended
fields.description: Adds the data in the Contacts and Ship To tabs to the search to find more results

fields.name: Fields
fields.description: based on the search criteria.

fields.name: The
fields.description: icon option Export to CSV creates a CSV file version of the results listed.

fields.name: Status

fields.name: Select
fields.description: Search for a prospect by selecting a status radio

fields.name: Salesperson
fields.description: The name of the salesperson associated with the prospect.

fields.name: Selling/Trading
fields.description: The unit being sold to the customer and any units being traded in by the customer.

fields.name: Source
fields.description: The source that the prospect originates from.
